content:
Running the test suites across all packages.All green across the board.

| Package | Tests | Result |
|---|---|---|
| dartclaw_core | 581 (+1 skipped) | All passed |
| dartclaw_config | 110 | All passed |
| dartclaw_storage | 100 | All passed |
| dartclaw_server | 1,405 | All passed |
| dartclaw_cli | 87 | All passed |
| **Total** | **2,283 (+1 skipped)** | **All passed** |

`‚òÖ Insight ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ`
The test count has grown significantly since the v0.5 baseline recorded in memory (1,359 ‚Üí 2,283). The dartclaw_server package alone jumped from 454 to 1,405 tests ‚Äî nearly tripled ‚Äî reflecting the density of the v0.6‚Äìv0.10 feature work (design system, context management, scheduling, tasks, etc.).
